reasoning: The order comments history contains a critical fraud alert. The customer, Bob Johnson, has a history of 15 refunds in 48 days with an 83% refund rate, primarily claiming 'item not received' despite tracking confirmation. The internal note explicitly instructs not to process further refunds and to escalate to Loss Prevention. Based on this documented history of fraudulent activity, the refund request is denied.
